message:
feat(ux): add live intervention and approval console (ft-3681t.9.5)

Unified operator console for pause/resume, manual takeover, approval
queues with risk-level classification, quarantine actions, and emergency
stop with global/pane scope. All actions produce audit records with
sequence numbers for forensic review.

27 unit tests covering state transitions, approval lifecycle, emergency
stop propagation, audit trail, serde roundtrips, and an E2E lifecycle
scenario with 5 panes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
